query: UPDATE island_guides SET topThingsToDo = '[{"title":"Snorkeling","description":"Explore vibrant coral reefs teeming with tropical fish, sea turtles, and colorful marine life in the crystal-clear waters surrounding Ukulhas. Perfect for all skill levels with shallow reef access."},{"title":"Diving","description":"Discover world-class dive sites featuring dramatic underwater pinnacles, abundant sharks, rays, and pristine coral formations. Experienced divers will appreciate the strong currents and rich biodiversity."},{"title":"Island Hopping","description":"Visit nearby islands and atolls by speedboat to experience different cultures, pristine beaches, and unique local traditions. Each island offers distinct charm and authentic Maldivian experiences."},{"title":"Local Cuisine","description":"Savor authentic Maldivian dishes featuring fresh seafood, coconut-based curries, and tropical fruits. Visit local restaurants and cafes to experience traditional flavors and warm hospitality."},{"title":"Photography","description":"Capture stunning sunsets, turquoise lagoons, and vibrant marine life. The dramatic lighting and natural beauty of Ukulhas provide endless opportunities for breathtaking photographs."}]' WHERE name = 'Ukulhas';
